name: /doctor --explain treats numeric severity 1 as equivalent to the string warn in the resolved severity output
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:\n  no-eval: 1\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain no-eval --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'effective_severity=warn' out.txt && grep -q 'source_value=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
